Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Titan Force]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The Titan Force is a group that includes Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — The Titan Force is known by reputation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — The Titan Force includes the Blue Titan, Red Titan, and Green Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — The Titan Force is a group of comrades Raion has fought alongside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The Titan Force is a group the narrator and Raion were previously part of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 47''' — The Titan Force is a group that includes Raion Raithe.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — The Titan Force is a group associated with the Red Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The Titan Force is a group dedicated to the protection of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Raion Raithe had time in the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — The Titan Force is a group that includes Yellow Knights.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — The Knights seek revenge on the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The headquarters of the Titan Force is on the second moon of Delsin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The Titan Force is an organization Raion belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The narrator never joined the Titan Knights in a previous life involving Raion and the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — The Titan Force is a group that includes the narrator and Kyri.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
